sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the unit-03 template (objectif fonctionnel + Point Langue grammar + thematic lexicon + DELF-style comprehension). Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego+ A1 (Hachette), Dossier 4 'À chacun son rythme' (les sorties, le futur proche aller + infinitif). Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
